title: matelea belizensis
intro: Matelea belizensis, also known as the "Mayan vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Matelea belizensis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Matelea belizensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote health and well-being, particularly in traditional Mayan medicine.
